name: LinkedIn Product Posts Agent - Watchlist MVP

meta.note: Import into n8n and replace the mock collector with an approved source.

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{author:'Satya Nadella',author_title:'CEO',company:'Microsoft',role_class:'CEO',post_title:'How product teams can move faster',post_text:'Product management must align discovery and execution.',likes:1420,comments:188,reposts:96,profile_url:'https://www.linkedin.com/in/satyanadella/',post_url:'https://www.linkedin.com/posts/example1',published_at:'2026-05-20T09:00:00Z'}}];
return items.map((item,i)=>({json:{...item.json,topic:'product_management',final_score:92.4,reason:'Strong product leadership relevance with high engagement.'}}));
